content.text:
Item Destruction Rules


# 📜 Item Destruction Rules

## Procedure

| Step | Rule                                                                                    |
| ---- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | When an ITEM DESTRUCTION check is called for by an attack or insult, begin this process |
| 2    | Roll d100 and determine the struck body area using the Paperdoll Hit Location Table.      |
| 3    | Determine which item(s) the character has in that slot that could be affected           |
| 4    | The item makes a d20 saving throw against the DC of the insult                          |
| 5    | Apply all relevant modifiers to the roll (see below)                                    |
| 6    | If the save fails, the item is destroyed; if it succeeds, the item is unaffected        |

---

## Paperdoll Hit Location Table

| d100 Roll | Location  | Item Slot               | % Chance |
| --------- | --------- | ----------------------- | -------- |
| 01–58     | Body      | Armor, Cloak, Belt      | 58%      |
| 59–68     | Head      | Helm, necklace                    | 10%      |
| 69–83     | Main Hand | Weapon                  | 15%      |
| 84–95     | Offhand   | Shield / Offhand Weapon | 12%      |
| 96–98     | Hands     | Gloves / Rings           | 3%       |
| 99–100    | Feet      | Boots                   | 2%       |

---

## Saving Throw Modifiers

| Modifier Source       | Effect                 |
| --------------------- | ---------------------- |
| Magical item          | +4 to the saving throw |
| Luck modifier (owner) | +1 per Luck modifier   |
| Minor insult          | No modifier            |
| Major insult          | −2 to the roll         |
| Massive insult        | −5 to the roll         |

---

## Special Rules

| Rule          | Effect                                                                                  |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Natural 1     | Always fails                                                                            |
| Natural 20    | Always succeeds                                                                         |
| Multiple hits | Some insults may affect multiple body areas, requiring multiple ITEM DESTRUCTION checks |
| Item limit    | Only one item can be affected per roll, even if multiple rolls are required             |

---

## Insult Severity

| Type    | Description                                                  |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Minor   | Weak effects (e.g., spit, weak acid, small creature attacks) |
| Major   | Standard dangerous effects                                   |
| Massive | Extremely destructive effects (e.g., dragon breath)          |

content.text:
Here’s a cleaned-up, table-ready version of your **Item Destruction Rules**.

---

# Item Destruction Rules

## Procedure

When an **ITEM DESTRUCTION** check is triggered by an attack or insult, follow these steps:

1. **Roll d100** on the **Paperdoll Hit Location Table** to determine the struck body area.
2. **Identify the item slot** associated with that location.
3. Determine **which item** in that slot could be affected.
4. The item makes a **d20 saving throw** against the **DC of the insult**.
5. Apply all relevant **saving throw modifiers**.
6. If the save **fails**, the item is **destroyed**. If the save **succeeds**, the item is **unaffected**.

---

## Paperdoll Hit Location Table

| d100 Roll | Location  | Item Slot               | Chance |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------------|--------|
| 01–58     | Body      | Armor, Cloak, Belt      | 58%    |
| 59–68     | Head      | Helm, Necklace          | 10%    |
| 69–83     | Main Hand | Weapon                  | 15%    |
| 84–95     | Offhand   | Shield / Offhand Weapon | 12%    |
| 96–98     | Hands     | Gloves / Rings          | 3%     |
| 99–100    | Feet      | Boots                   | 2%     |

---

## Saving Throw Modifiers

| Modifier Source       | Effect                  |
|-----------------------|-------------------------|
| Magical item          | +4 to the saving throw  |
| Luck modifier (owner) | +1 per Luck modifier    |
| Minor insult          | No modifier             |
| Major insult          | −2 to the roll          |
| Massive insult        | −5 to the roll          |

---

## Special Rules

| Rule          | Effect |
|---------------|--------|
| Natural 1     | Always fails |
| Natural 20    | Always succeeds |
| Multiple hits | Some insults may affect multiple body areas, requiring multiple **ITEM DESTRUCTION** checks |
| Item limit    | Only **one item** can be affected per roll, even if multiple rolls are required |

---

## Insult Severity

| Type    | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Minor   | Weak effects, such as spit, weak acid, or small creature attacks |
| Major   | Standard dangerous effects |
| Massive | Extremely destructive effects, such as dragon breath |

---

## Quick Reference

**Trigger:** Attack or insult calls for an ITEM DESTRUCTION check  
**Roll:** d100 for hit location  
**Target:** One item in the affected slot  
**Save:** d20 vs insult DC  
**Modifiers:** Magic, Luck, insult severity  
**Result:** Failed save = destroyed; successful save = unaffected

---

If you want, I can also turn this into:
- a **more rules-text / book style version**
- a **GM quick-reference card**
- a **Foundry / VTT-friendly table**
- or a **shorter, clearer version with edge-case clarifications**
